goal: Evaluate asr_qwen3 model on canonical ASR datasets using deterministic scripts and server-based prediction generation
execution_steps: prepare_dataset - prepare canonical datasets for ASR evaluation
generate_predictions - use MCP server to fill prediction files
evaluate_predictions - compute WER/CER metrics and RPS
notes: Model supports ASR task only (audio -> transcript)
Server-based prediction generation preferred over wrapper direct use
Supported languages: Chinese (zh), English (en), Japanese (ja), Korean (ko), auto
Prior evidence shows successful AISHELL-1 test
Dry run mode: false - will execute actual evaluation
